title: Can't select column in automation

posts.author: EthanPenn (Ethan Dale)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re having an issue where when we try and use the automation that links two boards, it won’t pop up and show us the columns.

GIF of the issue here

It’s a core feature of how our process works, and now we can’t get it set back up. How can we fix this?

posts.author: EthanPenn (Ethan Dale)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping the thread. We seriously need this to be working, there are thousands of items that are failing because of this.
